headlines.title_en: Alphabet plans to raise $80B to pay for AI buildout
headlines.summary_cn: Alphabet宣布计划通过股权融资800亿美元，用于扩建AI基础设施和计算能力，以满足企业及消费者对AI解决方案的强劲需求。目前需求已超过供给，此次大规模投资彰显其抢占AI赛道的决心。
headlines.summary_en: Alphabet announced plans to raise $80 billion through equity to expand AI infrastructure and computing capacity, driven by demand exceeding supply from enterprises and consumers. This massive investment underscores its commitment to leading the AI race.
headlines.student_note: 建议关注大型科技公司的AI资本开支动向，了解行业规模增长的关键驱动因素。

headlines.title_en: Alphabet announces $80B equity capital raise to expand AI infra and compute
headlines.summary_cn: Alphabet正式宣布通过股权融资800亿美元，用于扩展AI基础设施和计算能力。这是科技史上最大规模的融资之一，表明其全力投入AI领域。
headlines.summary_en: Alphabet officially announced an $80 billion equity capital raise to expand AI infrastructure and compute. This is one of the largest fundraises in tech history, signaling an all-in bet on AI.

headlines.summary_cn: AI公司Anthropic（Claude模型开发商）已提交IPO申请。作为大语言模型领域的重要玩家，其上市将影响AI行业竞争格局和资本流向。
headlines.summary_en: Anthropic, a major player in large language models, has filed to go public. The IPO could reshape the competitive landscape of the AI industry.
headlines.student_note: 关注AI独角兽上市动态，了解商业模式和投资趋势。

headlines.title_cn: Yann LeCun世界模型获形式化证明
headlines.title_en: Yann LeCun’s World Model Earns a Formal Proof: Benchmark Finds Current Models Brittle
headlines.summary_cn: Yann LeCun提出的世界模型（World Model）概念获得了形式化证明，同时新的基准测试发现当前主流AI模型在应对分布外场景时表现脆弱。这一成果为构建更鲁棒的AI系统提供了理论基础。
headlines.summary_en: Yann LeCun's World Model concept has received a formal proof, while a new benchmark finds that current AI models are brittle in out-of-distribution scenarios. This advancement provides a theoretical foundation for building more robust AI systems.
headlines.student_note: 推荐AI学生阅读相关论文，理解世界模型的核心思想及其对强化学习和机器人领域的潜在影响。

headlines.title_en: Andrej Karpathy Joins Anthropic to Lead Claude Pre-training Research
headlines.summary_cn: 著名AI研究员、前特斯拉AI总监Andrej Karpathy宣布加入Anthropic，担任Claude预训练研究的负责人。他将直接领导下一代Claude模型的基础预训练工作，有望带来训推技术的重大突破。
headlines.summary_en: Renowned AI researcher Andrej Karpathy has joined Anthropic to lead Claude pre-training research. He will oversee the foundational pre-training of next-generation Claude models, potentially bringing major breakthroughs in training and inference techniques.
headlines.student_note: 强烈推荐AI学生关注Karpathy的研究动向和公开分享，他是学习深度学习和LLM预训练的绝佳资源。

items.title_en: hernandez42/APEX-MEM
items.summary_cn: APEX-MEM 是一个开源的AI智能体多维度记忆系统，支持5D记忆、混合检索（BM25+向量+图）、梦境巩固和自愈功能。它可作为流行的 mem0 的即插即用替代品，兼容其API，提供更强的记忆持久性和检索能力。
items.summary_en: APEX-MEM is an open-source multidimensional memory system for AI agents, featuring 5D memory, hybrid retrieval (BM25+vector+graph), dream consolidation, and self-healing. It serves as a drop-in replacement for the popular mem0 with full compatibility adapters.
items.student_note: 推荐AI方向学生阅读源代码，学习如何设计增强型记忆系统以提升智能体对话和任务连续性。

items.title_en: 1-Bit Bonsai Image 4B Image Generation for Local Devices
items.summary_cn: 一项名为1-Bit Bonsai的新技术实现了在本地设备上运行40亿参数的图像生成模型，通过二值化压缩大幅降低计算和内存需求，推动AI部署到手机等边缘设备。
items.summary_en: 1-Bit Bonsai enables 4-billion-parameter image generation models to run on local devices via binary quantization, drastically reducing compute and memory requirements, bringing AI to edge devices like smartphones.
items.student_note: 推荐学习模型压缩与量化技术，对嵌入式AI和移动端部署研究极具参考价值。

items.title_en: GitHub and the crime against software
items.summary_cn: 一篇Hacker News热帖批评GitHub对软件行业造成负面影响，可能涉及代码托管垄断、AI训练数据滥用或对开源社区的不良影响。文章引发了对平台侧责任的讨论。
items.summary_en: A trending Hacker News post criticizes GitHub for harming the software ecosystem, potentially over monopoly concerns, AI training data use, or negative impacts on open-source communities. It sparks debate on platform responsibility.
items.student_note: 建议思考开源平台的角色与伦理问题，对软件工程专业学生有独特启发。

items.title_en: Alphabet plans to raise $80B to pay for AI buildout
items.summary_cn: Alphabet宣布计划通过股权融资800亿美元，用于扩建AI基础设施和计算能力，以满足企业及消费者对AI解决方案的强劲需求。目前需求已超过供给，此次大规模投资彰显其抢占AI赛道的决心。
items.summary_en: Alphabet announced plans to raise $80 billion through equity to expand AI infrastructure and computing capacity, driven by demand exceeding supply from enterprises and consumers. This massive investment underscores its commitment to leading the AI race.
items.student_note: 建议关注大型科技公司的AI资本开支动向，了解行业规模增长的关键驱动因素。

items.title_en: Alphabet announces $80B equity capital raise to expand AI infra and compute
items.summary_cn: Alphabet正式宣布通过股权融资800亿美元，用于扩展AI基础设施和计算能力。这是科技史上最大规模的融资之一，表明其全力投入AI领域。
items.summary_en: Alphabet officially announced an $80 billion equity capital raise to expand AI infrastructure and compute. This is one of the largest fundraises in tech history, signaling an all-in bet on AI.

items.title_en: Anthropic files to go public
items.summary_cn: AI公司Anthropic（Claude模型开发商）已提交IPO申请。作为大语言模型领域的重要玩家，其上市将影响AI行业竞争格局和资本流向。
items.summary_en: Anthropic, a major player in large language models, has filed to go public. The IPO could reshape the competitive landscape of the AI industry.
items.student_note: 关注AI独角兽上市动态，了解商业模式和投资趋势。

items.title_en: Florida sues OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman, claiming company concealed serious risks of ChatGPT
items.summary_cn: 佛罗里达州起诉OpenAI及CEO Sam Altman，指控其隐瞒ChatGPT的严重风险，包括可能导致暴力行为。这是首例州级针对AI产品安全性的重大诉讼。
items.summary_en: Florida sued OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman, alleging the company concealed serious risks of ChatGPT, including potential links to violent incidents. This is the first major state-level lawsuit targeting AI product safety.
items.student_note: 推荐关注AI监管与法律案例，了解技术企业承担的社会责任边界。

items.title_cn: 佛州首例起诉OpenAI涉暴力事件
items.title_en: Florida sues OpenAI, Sam Altman, in first-of-its-kind lawsuit over violent incidents
items.summary_cn: 佛罗里达州首次以独特方式起诉OpenAI，指控其产品ChatGPT与去年佛罗里达州立大学枪击案等暴力事件有关，未履行安全责任。该案可能成为AI问责的标志性案例。
items.summary_en: Florida filed a first-of-its-kind lawsuit against OpenAI and Sam Altman, alleging ChatGPT's involvement in violent incidents including the Florida State University shooting, and failure to ensure safety. This case could set a precedent for AI accountability.

items.title_en: Florida sues OpenAI and Sam Altman over alleged safety lapses
items.summary_cn: 多个权威媒体报道，佛罗里达州起诉OpenAI及Sam Altman，指控其忽视AI安全风险，导致用户受到伤害。诉讼焦点在于公司是否充分披露了ChatGPT的潜在危害。
items.summary_en: Multiple outlets report that Florida has sued OpenAI and Sam Altman over alleged safety lapses, claiming the company disregarded AI risks and caused user harm. The suit centers on whether risks were adequately disclosed.

items.title_cn: 佛罗里达州起诉OpenAI五大指控
items.title_en: 5 most explosive claims from Florida's lawsuit against OpenAI, Sam Altman
items.summary_cn: 佛罗里达州对OpenAI和Sam Altman的诉讼列出了五项爆炸性指控，包括隐瞒ChatGPT风险、误导用户等。该案引自Fox Business报道。
items.summary_en: Florida's lawsuit against OpenAI and Sam Altman highlights five explosive claims, including allegations that the company hid ChatGPT's risks from users and misled the public.

items.title_cn: 佛罗里达州再诉OpenAI隐瞒风险
items.title_en: Florida sues OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman, claiming company hid ChatGPT risks from users
items.summary_cn: 佛罗里达州起诉OpenAI及其CEO Sam Altman，指控公司隐瞒ChatGPT对用户的风险，优先考虑利润而非公众安全。这是政府层面针对AI风险的又一法律行动。
items.summary_en: Florida has sued OpenAI and its CEO Sam Altman, alleging the company concealed ChatGPT's risks from users, prioritizing profits over safety.

items.title_cn: 佛罗里达州诉OpenAI造成AI危害
items.title_en: Florida sues OpenAI and Sam Altman over AI risks
items.summary_cn: 根据WSJ报道，佛罗里达州总检察长起诉OpenAI因AI造成的危害，指控其违反消费者保护法。这是对AI公司法律责任的又一次重大考验。
items.summary_en: Florida's attorney general has sued OpenAI over AI harms, alleging violations of consumer protection laws. This marks another significant legal action against AI risks at the government level.

items.title_en: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now available on AWS
items.summary_cn: OpenAI的前沿模型（如GPT-4等）和代码生成模型Codex现已通过AWS提供。企业可以在熟悉的AWS环境中使用OpenAI能力，利用现有工作流和采购流程，从而加速从评估到生产的过程。
items.summary_en: OpenAI's frontier models and Codex are now generally available on AWS, allowing enterprises to build with OpenAI using their existing AWS environments and controls. This enables faster evaluation to production transitions.
items.student_note: 推荐AI学生尝试在AWS上使用OpenAI API，了解云端部署和集成流程。

items.title_en: Anthropic confidentially submits draft S-1 to the SEC
items.summary_cn: AI公司Anthropic已秘密向美国SEC提交S-1注册声明草案，筹备首次公开募股（IPO），预计2026年上市。此举反映了AI赛道独角兽的资本化进程加快。
items.summary_en: AI company Anthropic has confidentially submitted a draft S-1 to the SEC, preparing for an IPO expected in 2026. This reflects the accelerating capitalization of AI unicorns.
items.student_note: 关注AI初创公司的上市路径，对理解行业估值和商业可持续性有帮助。

items.title_en: Florida sues Open AI, Sam Altman: ‘They have chosen profit over public safety’
items.summary_cn: 佛罗里达州在起诉中直指OpenAI“选择利润而非公共安全”，强调ChatGPT风险未被充分披露。此举表明监管机构对AI安全的持续关注。
items.summary_en: Florida's lawsuit accuses OpenAI of choosing profit over public safety, emphasizing that AI risks were not fully disclosed to users.

items.title_cn: OpenAI在密歇根建设大型数据中心
items.title_en: Building the infrastructure for the Intelligence Age in Michigan
items.summary_cn: OpenAI作为Stargate项目的一部分，在密歇根州破土动工建设一个1GW的数据中心项目。该项目旨在扩展AI基础设施以降低访问门槛、创造就业机会并支持当地社区，标志着AI基础设施建设进入新阶段。
items.summary_en: OpenAI has broken ground on a 1GW data center project in Michigan as part of the Stargate initiative, aiming to expand AI infrastructure, create jobs, and support communities. This marks a new phase in large-scale AI infrastructure development.

items.title_cn: ChatGPT插件被曝窃取工作表数据
items.title_en: ChatGPT for Google Sheets exfiltrates workbooks
items.summary_cn: 有报道称ChatGPT for Google Sheets插件存在数据泄露风险，可能窃取工作表内容。用户应警惕第三方AI工具的权限范围，避免敏感数据泄露。
items.summary_en: Reports indicate that the ChatGPT for Google Sheets extension can exfiltrate workbook data, posing a security risk. Users are advised to be cautious when using third-party AI plugins.
items.student_note: 检查自己使用的AI工具权限，注意数据安全。

items.title_en: Our views on AI policy and political advocacy
items.summary_cn: OpenAI发表声明，阐述其在AI政策和政治倡导上的立场：支持透明、审慎的监管和AI安全，并澄清没有任何外部政治团体代表公司发言。
items.summary_en: OpenAI released a statement on its views regarding AI policy and political advocacy, supporting transparency, thoughtful regulation, and AI safety, and noting that no outside political group speaks on its behalf.
items.student_note: 可了解AI公司如何平衡商业利益与政策立场。

items.title_en: Andrej Karpathy Joins Anthropic to Lead Claude Pre-training Research
items.summary_cn: 著名AI研究员、前特斯拉AI总监Andrej Karpathy宣布加入Anthropic，担任Claude预训练研究的负责人。他将直接领导下一代Claude模型的基础预训练工作，有望带来训推技术的重大突破。
items.summary_en: Renowned AI researcher Andrej Karpathy has joined Anthropic to lead Claude pre-training research. He will oversee the foundational pre-training of next-generation Claude models, potentially bringing major breakthroughs in training and inference techniques.
items.student_note: 强烈推荐AI学生关注Karpathy的研究动向和公开分享，他是学习深度学习和LLM预训练的绝佳资源。

items.title_en: Stargate live updates: OpenAI's Altman says 'people are right to be anxious' about AI
items.summary_cn: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman在Stargate项目更新中表示，公众对AI的担忧是合理的，但强调应积极应对而非恐惧。他同时透露了OpenAI在基础设施上的进一步投入。
items.summary_en: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman stated in a Stargate update that public anxiety about AI is justified, but urged proactive engagement rather than fear. He also hinted at further infrastructure investments.

items.title_cn: 投资者质疑英伟达与SpaceX芯片交易
items.title_en: Michael Burry Just Called Nvidia's SpaceX Chip Deal 'Fugazi.' Here's Why It All Seems Wrong
items.summary_cn: 知名投资者Michael Burry（电影《大空头》原型）批评英伟达与SpaceX的芯片交易是“假的”，认为其中存在可疑之处。这引发了对AI芯片合作真实性的讨论。
items.summary_en: Investor Michael Burry (of 'The Big Short' fame) called Nvidia's chip deal with SpaceX 'fugazi', questioning its legitimacy. This adds controversy to the AI chip market.

items.title_cn: Claude爆发迫使Anthropic投靠马斯克获400亿
items.title_en: Claude's Boom Just Forced Anthropic Into Musk's Arms For $40B
items.summary_cn: 由于Claude模型的快速增长，Anthropic被迫通过价值约400亿美元的交易与Elon Musk联手。这一巨额合作旨在获取更多算力和资源，以满足Claude的爆发式需求，标志着AI竞争格局的剧变。
items.summary_en: The boom of Claude has forced Anthropic into a $40 billion deal with Elon Musk. The multi-billion-dollar collaboration aims to secure compute and resources for Claude's explosive growth, signaling a major shift in the AI competitive landscape.

items.title_cn: 新加坡法院否决xAI文件请求
items.title_en: Singapore court denies xAI’s requests for documents in lawsuit against Apple and OpenAI
items.summary_cn: 新加坡法院正式驳回了xAI在起诉苹果和OpenAI案中要求当地企业提供文件的请求，维护了数据保护立场。该裁决强化了跨境取证中的地域限制。
items.summary_en: A Singapore court denied xAI's requests for documents from local companies in its lawsuit against Apple and OpenAI, upholding data protection principles and reinforcing jurisdictional limits on cross-border discovery.

items.title_en: From Claude to Colossus: why Anthropic needed Elon Musk
items.summary_cn: 文章分析了Anthropic从Claude到Colossus的发展过程中，为何需要与Elon Musk合作。据称，为了获得足够的算力和资金以支持模型扩张，Anthropic寻求Musk的参与，这引发了业界对AI巨头联盟的讨论。
items.summary_en: The article explores why Anthropic needed Elon Musk from Claude to Colossus. It suggests that to secure sufficient compute and funding for model scaling, Anthropic sought Musk's involvement, sparking discussions about AI giant alliances.

items.title_en: Singapore says ‘nope’ to xAI’s requests for documents from local companies as part of Elon Musk’s lawsuit against Apple and OpenAI
items.summary_cn: 新加坡当局拒绝了xAI（马斯克旗下公司）要求当地企业提供文件的请求，这些文件是马斯克起诉苹果和OpenAI案中的一部分。此举体现了数据主权与司法管辖权之间的张力。
items.summary_en: Singapore denied xAI's requests for documents from local companies in connection with Elon Musk's lawsuit against Apple and OpenAI, highlighting tensions between data sovereignty and cross-border litigation.

items.title_cn: 英伟达用AI Agent PC抢CPU市场
items.title_en: Nvidia chases $200B CPU market with AI agent PCs from Microsoft, Dell, and HP
items.summary_cn: 英伟达联合微软、戴尔、惠普推出搭载AI Agent的PC，试图撬动价值2000亿美元的CPU市场。如果成功，将让AI代理更安全、易用地进入普通消费者手中。
items.summary_en: Nvidia is partnering with Microsoft, Dell, and HP to launch AI agent PCs, targeting the $200 billion CPU market. If successful, it could bring AI agents safely and usefully to the masses.
items.student_note: 建议学习AI Agent概念及其在边缘设备上的部署，对未来应用开发很有价值。

items.title_cn: AI气象初创公司预报超越官方
items.title_en: This AI weather startup is out-forecasting government agencies
items.summary_cn: AI气象初创公司WindBorne通过结合模型构建和约400个高空气球实时数据收集，在预报准确性上超过政府机构。其创新在于实时数据驱动迭代。
items.summary_en: AI weather startup WindBorne outperforms government agencies in forecasting by combining model-building with data collection from ~400 balloons in flight. Its advances come from improved real-time data integration.
items.student_note: 了解AI+特定领域（如气象）的创新模式，关注数据驱动方法。

items.title_en: DuckDuckGo makes its 'no-AI' search engine easier to access as its traffic booms
items.summary_cn: DuckDuckGo 进一步简化了其“无AI”搜索引擎的访问方式，该引擎不依赖AI生成答案，强调隐私和传统搜索体验。近期其流量大幅增长，反映出部分用户对主流搜索引擎集成AI功能的担忧或反感。
items.summary_en: DuckDuckGo has made its 'no-AI' search engine even easier to access, a move that coincides with a surge in traffic. The engine offers a traditional, privacy-focused search experience without AI-generated answers, appealing to users wary of AI integration in mainstream search.

items.title_cn: 环保活动家质疑数据中心透明度
items.title_en: Erin Brockovich takes aim at data center secrecy
items.summary_cn: 环保活动家Erin Brockovich将矛头指向数据中心行业的保密行为，要求公开更多关于数据中心能源消耗、水资源使用和环境影响的数据。她认为数据中心的快速增长正带来严重的环境后果，亟需透明度。
items.summary_en: Environmental activist Erin Brockovich is challenging data center secrecy, demanding more transparency about energy consumption, water usage, and environmental impacts. She argues that rapid data center growth has significant environmental consequences.

items.title_en: AI Agent Guidelines for CS336 at Stanford
items.summary_cn: 斯坦福大学CS336课程发布了AI代理使用指南，帮助学生负责任地使用AI工具完成编程与学习任务，涵盖学术诚信、引用规范及有效交互策略。
items.summary_en: Stanford's CS336 course released AI Agent guidelines to help students use AI tools responsibly in programming and learning, covering academic integrity, citation practices, and effective interaction strategies.
items.student_note: 强烈推荐大学生阅读，了解如何合规、高效地利用AI辅助学习，避免学术不端风险。

items.title_cn: YC初创公司释放闲置GPU算力
items.title_en: Launch HN: Expanse (YC P26) – Unlock Wasted GPU Capacity
items.summary_cn: YC孵化的Expanse项目旨在通过优化调度器（如Kubernetes、SLURM）来释放被浪费的GPU计算能力。对于有AI算力需求的学生和团队很有参考价值。
items.summary_en: Expanse, a YC-backed startup, helps unlock wasted GPU capacity by optimizing cluster schedulers like Kubernetes and SLURM. This is valuable for anyone dealing with AI compute resources.
items.student_note: 如果你在实验室或学校使用GPU集群，可以关注类似工具提高利用率。

items.title_cn: 海盗湾遭突袭20年仍坚挺
items.title_en: The Pirate Bay Remains Resilient, 20 Years After the Raid
items.summary_cn: 知名盗版网站海盗湾在20年前遭到执法部门突袭后依然存活并发展，展现了去中心化架构和社区维护的顽强生命力，也反映了版权执法面临的挑战。
items.summary_en: The Pirate Bay remains resilient 20 years after a major police raid, demonstrating the endurance of decentralized architecture and community support, while highlighting challenges in copyright enforcement.

items.title_en: Water access is now a risk factor in SpaceX’s IPO
items.summary_cn: SpaceX在IPO文件中指出，其数据中心冷却需要大量水资源，获取充足且廉价的用水成为风险因素。这反映了AI计算对环境资源（尤其是水）的影响，值得关注。
items.summary_en: SpaceX's IPO filing lists water access as a risk factor, as the company requires significant water resources to cool its data centers. This underscores the environmental impact of AI computing infrastructure.
items.student_note: 关注AI基础设施的环境成本，可思考可持续发展挑战。

items.title_cn: AI时代原型开发速度变革
items.title_en: The Speed of Prototyping in the Age of AI
items.summary_cn: 文章探讨了AI（如大语言模型、代码生成工具）如何极大缩短从想法到原型的时间，推动快速迭代。这对产品开发和创业有重要启示。
items.summary_en: This article explores how AI tools accelerate prototyping, drastically reducing the time from idea to prototype. This enables faster iteration and innovation in product development.
items.student_note: 推荐阅读，理解AI如何提升个人和团队的开发效率。

items.title_en: Making sense of the debate over AI psychosis
items.summary_cn: 在TechCrunch的播客节目中，嘉宾们就科技CEO是否特别容易陷入“AI妄想症”展开辩论。“AI妄想症”指对AI能力过度乐观或偏执的倾向，该讨论反映了行业对AI风险与机遇的深层焦虑。
items.summary_en: In a TechCrunch Equity episode, guests debate whether tech CEOs are uniquely prone to 'AI psychosis'—an excessive optimism or paranoia about AI. The discussion reflects deep industry anxieties over AI risks and opportunities.

items.title_cn: 追踪巨大小行星与失败超新星
items.title_en: Rubin Tracks Skyscraper-Size Asteroids and Failed Supernovas
items.summary_cn: 鲁宾天文台（Vera C. Rubin Observatory）正利用其强大的巡天能力，追踪尺寸堪比摩天大楼的小行星以及未能成功爆发的“失败超新星”。这些观测将帮助科学家理解太阳系天体分布和恒星演化过程。
items.summary_en: The Rubin Observatory is using its powerful sky survey capabilities to track skyscraper-sized asteroids and failed supernovas. These observations will help scientists understand the distribution of solar system objects and stellar evolution.

items.title_cn: 蓝牙名称触发美联航航班返航
items.title_en: United Airlines 767 returns to Newark after Bluetooth name sparks alert
items.summary_cn: 美联航一架767客机因某蓝牙设备名称触发安全警报，被迫返回纽瓦克机场。此事件凸显航空业对无线设备的敏感性和潜在安全漏洞，也反映出数字安全与航空安全的交叉。
items.summary_en: A United Airlines 767 returned to Newark after a Bluetooth device name triggered a security alert. The incident highlights the aviation industry's sensitivity to wireless devices and potential security vulnerabilities.

items.title_cn: Yann LeCun世界模型获形式化证明
items.title_en: Yann LeCun’s World Model Earns a Formal Proof: Benchmark Finds Current Models Brittle
items.summary_cn: Yann LeCun提出的世界模型（World Model）概念获得了形式化证明，同时新的基准测试发现当前主流AI模型在应对分布外场景时表现脆弱。这一成果为构建更鲁棒的AI系统提供了理论基础。
items.summary_en: Yann LeCun's World Model concept has received a formal proof, while a new benchmark finds that current AI models are brittle in out-of-distribution scenarios. This advancement provides a theoretical foundation for building more robust AI systems.
items.student_note: 推荐AI学生阅读相关论文，理解世界模型的核心思想及其对强化学习和机器人领域的潜在影响。
